subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The Single, the One remembereth thee from His Most Exalted Habitation, and summoneth thee unto the Most Great Word, and counseleth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یذکرک الفرد الاحد من مقره الاعلی و یدعوک الی الکلمه العلیا و یوصیک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
